About Me

The Engineer Behind the Intelligence

Harshita Rajput

Junior Associate R&D · CertifyMe

New Delhi, India

I'm an AI-focused Software Engineer who builds real intelligent systems — not just experiments. My work sits at the intersection of machine learning, backend engineering, and product thinking.

Currently in Research & Development at CertifyMe, I work on Generative AI workflows, LLM-powered automation, and scalable Flask backends that power digital products used in production.

My project work spans NLP-powered blogging platforms, emotion-aware recommendation systems, real-time sentiment analysis, and computer vision applications — each built end-to-end with a focus on solving real problems.

I believe great AI engineering is 20% models and 80% systems thinking. I care deeply about building AI that works reliably, scales gracefully, and delivers measurable user value.

Projects

Things I've Built

End-to-end AI applications — from NLP pipelines to computer vision systems — each solving a real problem with production-quality engineering.

Viblog — AI Powered Blogging Platform

Apr 2025 – Jun 2025

A scalable AI-enabled blogging platform with NLP-powered content intelligence. Automatically generates keyword suggestions, topic tags, and metadata to improve blog discoverability. Features secure auth, role-based access, and a responsive SEO-optimized frontend.

  • NLP-based auto-generation of keyword suggestions, topic tags & metadata
  • Secure authentication, session handling & role-based access control
  • RESTful routing with dynamic content management
  • SEO-optimized responsive frontend for improved engagement
PythonFlaskJinjaMySQLNLPHTML5CSS3BootstrapJavaScript

DJoz — Emotion-Based Music & Video Recommender

Sep 2024 – Jun 2025Research Published

An AI-driven recommendation system that detects user emotions via real-time facial recognition and maps them to personalized multimedia recommendations. Trained ML models classify emotional states across multiple genres. Research published in IJRASET.

  • Real-time facial emotion detection using OpenCV
  • ML models classifying emotional states for personalized recommendations
  • End-to-end full-stack system with Flask backend & dynamic frontend
  • Published in IJRASET international research journal
PythonOpenCVFlaskMySQLMachine LearningComputer Vision

VibeCheck Twitter — Sentiment Analysis Platform

Sep 2024 – Nov 2024

A real-time sentiment analysis platform that processes social media data using ML pipelines. Implements Logistic Regression and Naive Bayes classifiers with full NLP preprocessing and dynamic Chart.js dashboards for live trend monitoring.

  • Multi-class sentiment classification with Logistic Regression & Naive Bayes
  • Full NLP pipeline: tokenization, stop-word removal, stemming, TF-IDF
  • Dynamic Chart.js dashboards for live hashtag & event sentiment trends
  • Real-time data processing and visualization
PythonFlaskMySQLLogistic RegressionNaive BayesTF-IDFChart.js

Enterprise Resource Planning System

Jul 2024 – Sep 2024

A modular full-stack ERP platform enabling real-time account management and operational tracking. Supports role-based access for admin, manager, and staff. Features bulk data upload/download pipelines and responsive Bootstrap UI.

  • Role-based authentication for admin, manager & staff levels
  • Bulk data upload, download & validation pipelines
  • Real-time account management and operational tracking
  • Responsive cross-device Bootstrap interface
PythonFlaskMySQLBootstrapHTML5CSS3REST APIs

Face Detection & Recognition System

Feb 2024 – Jun 2024

A computer vision system for real-time facial detection and identification using OpenCV and the LBPH algorithm. Includes model training, webcam inference, image preprocessing, and data augmentation for improved accuracy under varied lighting.

  • Real-time face detection & identification via webcam using LBPH
  • Model training pipeline with image preprocessing & data augmentation
  • Optimized for resource-constrained devices
  • Improved recognition accuracy under varied lighting conditions
PythonOpenCVLBPH AlgorithmComputer VisionImage Processing
AI Lab

Active Research & Experiments

What I'm currently exploring, building, and learning at the frontier of AI engineering.

Generative AIActive Research

Prompt Engineering Patterns

Exploring advanced prompt engineering techniques — chain-of-thought, few-shot, system prompting, and structured output generation with Claude and GPT models. Documenting patterns that reliably improve output quality.

Claude AIGPT-4Prompt DesignChain-of-Thought
research progress78%
Workflow AutomationIn Progress

LLM-Powered Automation Workflows

Building production-grade automation pipelines using LLMs for document processing, content generation, and intelligent data extraction. Exploring agentic patterns with tool use and multi-step reasoning.

LLM AgentsTool UseDocument AIAutomation
research progress60%
Computer Vision + NLPExploring

Multi-Modal AI Integration

Investigating the intersection of vision and language models — building systems that can understand images and generate contextual text descriptions, enabling richer AI product experiences.

Vision ModelsCLIPImage CaptioningMulti-Modal
research progress35%
Affective ComputingResearch Phase

Emotion-Contextual AI Systems

Researching how to build AI systems that understand emotional context from text and adapt their responses accordingly — moving beyond sentiment classification toward true emotional intelligence.

Emotion AIAffective ComputingNLPPersonalization
research progress45%

Let's Collaborate
Engineering Blog

Engineering Insights

Technical articles on AI engineering, NLP, generative AI, and building intelligent systems in production.

NLP EngineeringJan 2025

Building Production-Ready NLP Pipelines with Flask

A deep dive into architecting scalable NLP systems — from model selection and preprocessing to REST API design and deployment considerations for real-world usage.

8 min read
Read
Generative AIFeb 2025

Prompt Engineering Patterns That Actually Work

Practical patterns for getting reliable, structured outputs from LLMs — covering chain-of-thought, few-shot learning, role prompting, and output format constraints.

6 min read
Read
AI ResearchMar 2025

Emotion Recognition in Text: Beyond Binary Sentiment

Exploring multi-class emotion recognition models — comparing rule-based VADER, fine-tuned BERT, and zero-shot classification approaches for affective computing.

10 min read
Read
Computer VisionMar 2025

Computer Vision in Web Apps: A Practical Guide

How to integrate real-time computer vision into web applications using Flask and OpenCV — covering webcam streaming, model inference, and performance optimization.

7 min read
Read
Generative AIApr 2025

Building LLM Agents That Actually Work in Production

Moving beyond demos — how to design reliable agentic systems with proper tool use, error recovery, memory, and observability for real product environments.

9 min read
Read
Backend EngineeringDec 2024

MySQL Query Optimization for Flask Applications

Practical techniques for speeding up MySQL queries in Flask backends — indexing strategies, query profiling, N+1 problem patterns, and connection pool tuning.

7 min read
Read
